blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No externally exposed fault-injection or controllable provider outage hook was available on the public HTTP surface to reproduce failure and recovery.
No validator-usable provider outage trigger was exposed, so repeated provider-failure fallback behavior could not be exercised through real HTTP requests.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the observed ~75s readiness wait on port 3102 and noted that /diagnostics/runtime is available but no public fault-injection hook exists for provider outage simulation.
